news.t: VanEck Launches WARP ETF for Access to Rapidly Expanding Space Economy

holdings.infoBox: WARP is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Rocket Lab stock at 9.77%, Viasat at 7.84%, Planet Labs PBC at 7.22%, Iridium Communications at 6.52%, and EchoStar at 6.49%.

overview.description: The VanEck Space ETF (WARP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Space index. The fund tracks an index of global companies involved in the space economy, including satellite communications, launch systems, orbital infrastructure, and related space technologies. WARP was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Launches WARP ETF for Access to Rapidly Expanding Space Economy
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches WARP, providing exposure to companies driving commercialization of space, including satellite infrastructure, reusable rockets & more.
